bikes.description: It was stolen in Princes Island Park near a playground. It is a Hyper boundary trail bike 26" which is mostly black aluminum frame and the logos and other parts are filled with blue.
bikes.title: 2020 Hyper

bikes.description:
Yeti SB130 LR - Spruce
Sram X01 - Drivetrain
Crank Brothers E11 Synthesis - Wheels
Minion DHR 2 (2.9 front, 2.4 rear) - Tires
One Up Bashguide and Side Pump
Shimano XTR Trail - Pedals
bikes.title: 2019 Yeti SB 130 LR

bikes.description: In good health, but some significant paint damage on the handlebars and the cord coupling is loose around the frame.
bikes.title: 2020 Cannondale Trail 8

bikes.description:
The bike is easily identifiable, it is a one-of-a-kind, stripped-paint, medium 2018 Vitus Sommet bike. The blue pivot link in the middle has the original blue paint from when the bike had a blue/yellow finish. The front triangle has a noticeable dent on the bottom tube on the right side around the middle. There is no "Vitus" branding anywhere except on the black plastic bottom tube protector around the bottom bracket. The black fork has no decals because the lowers were replaced just before I had this stolen. If the frame was parted out, some suspension bearings are missing the seals.

Parts include:
Manitou Mattoc comp 160mm air fork with adjustable travel (140-160mm). Fork has red Absolute+ damper adjustment, blue rebound adjustment knob, and black air valve cap
Nukeproof Neutron 31.8mm riser bar (≈735-755mm)
Dimensions trail stem, black, 35mm length
Shorex neon neon green lock-on grips with purple ODI bar ends
Schwalbe Eddy Current front/rear tires 27.5"x2.8" with Slime sealant
RockShox Super Deluxe rear shock with piggyback. No lockout but with rebound adjustment
Shimano "Zee" BL-M640-B left brake lever for the front, Shimano Deore style rear brake lever on the right
203mm rotor on the front, 180mm rotor in the rear (both with 2-piston hydraulic calipers mounted on adapters)
15x110mm Boost Thru Axle on the front is silver, both the threaded cap and the axle itself. Boost 12x148mm boost Rear axle is black
WTB TCS i29 27.5" 650b double walled Rims both mounted tubeless, gorilla tape rim strip, different tubeless valves for each rim (one is silver, and one is a black Bontrager Round Base TLR Valve Stem, neither valve has a cap), double butted spokes
FSA tapered headset, one of the ball bearings is missing a ball
FSA HOLLOWTECH II threaded silver bottom bracket with a cracked plastic cap on one side and a direction arrow sticker being stripped
Novatec hubs loose rubber seal on the rear and damaged freehub body on the rear hub, 110mm x 15mm boost spacing on the front and 148mm x 12mm boost on the rear
Carbon fiber stem spacers (one wider than the others)
Specialized Targa Body Geometry Saddle
OneUp Components V2 dropper seat post (31.6mm diameter) and is set at the max 210mm travel with no golden spacers under the shim where there would be pill-shaped spacers
Microshift advent 11-46 9-speed black steel cassette
Microshift advent 9-speed rear derailleur, clutch version, with the plastic clutch cover taken out to expose metal internals and on/off switch
SLX - HOLLOWTECH II 2x 2-piece crankset with a bent 1x narrow-wide Shimano chainring (I believe 32t but possibly 30t) with one or several chainring threads stripped or on the verge of being stripped, non-driveside crank has plastic cap-screw
Flat black plastic pedals with adjustable metal pins, some pins missing
A 9 or 10 speed chain, probably a KMC X9 with KMC masterlink or possibly a black logoless masterlink from a Sram chain
Topeak MODULA EX ADJUSTABLE BOTTLE CAGE with white bottom piece and black top piece, yellow plastic screw on the bottom. One of the bottle cage rivet threads on the frame is slightly stripped at an angle
bikes.title: 2018 Vitus Sommet

bikes.description: Hard Tail Mountain Bike, some blue writing, but mostly matte black.  There was a single side-loading bottle cage on the down tube, which was black.  I removed the reflectors and the dork disc as well.
bikes.title: 2018 Cannondale Trail 5

bikes.description:
Titanium Salsa Timberjack.  Most decals were removed but Salsa logo on the front is still there.  Remaining decals spell out "Tim" on the side.  See below for complete parts list.  Thanks for keeping your eyes out. 

Pike Select 130
MAXXIS 2.4 width DHRII Tires
29" Raceface ARC 25 wheels, DT Swiss
350 hubs, Micro Spline 12-spd driver
SRAM X01 cranks (170mm) w 32T SRAM X-SYNC 2 chainring
SRAM X01 12-spd derailleur
SRAM X01 12-spd shifter
SRAM X01 chain
Shimano XT 10-51 cassette
Shimano 180mm icetech 6B rotors
One-up V2 dropper - 210 mm
Wolf tooth dropper lever
King headset. "MATTE BOURBON" 
TRP G spec trail SLC brakes front and back
180mm SRAM rotors
DUB BB
Santa Cruz 35.8 carbon bars with Ergon grips and Race Face 35mm stem
29" Raceface ARC 25 Offset wheels, DT Swiss 350 Hubs, 12-spd Micro Spline Hub
bikes.title: 2020 Salsa Timberjack

bikes.description:
MY PK RIPPER HAS BEEN STOLEN HERE NEAR A BIKE TRAIL NEAR HART PARK.IVE HAD THIS BIKE SINCE NEW AND ITS VERY SENTIMENTAL TO ME. IF ANYBODY SEES IT FINDS IT FOR SALE, PARTS BEING SOLD SEPERATELY, OR SEE IT SOMEWHERE MESSAGE ME. I WAS ON THE SIDE OF THE ROAD NEAR CALM, AND NEAR LAKE MING. THIS IS KERN COUNTY BTW.
SERIAL NUMBER: PK71705
Possible police number: 2387280
It had SE Powerwing Bars Repop
Black Oakley 3 Grips
Baby Blue and Brown outline of letters
Camo Padset
Black Uni Seat
Polished Profile Bottom Bracket
Black Tioga Comp III Tires With Black Skyway Graphite Mags
20x 1 3/8 wheels, power lite polished
Gold Dia Compe Seat Clamp
Black n Gold D.I.D Chain
Black Dia Compe MX1000 Brake
SE Crankset Polished
Black 44T Redline Sprocket 
16T Freewheel
Gold Ruf Neck Stem
Tange Headset Chrome
Black Xpedo Platform pedals
Black Shimano Brake Line
Tektro Brake lever
Also had 20x 1 3/8 wheels but it wasn’t on the bike at the time
NOTE: the vintage pk ripper got stolen, the newer one (the one with me in the picture) has 20 x 1 3/8 wheels that were also with the old PK the time it got stolen so I included it with the photos if the bike could look like that also
All I could remember...
bikes.title: 1984 SE Bikes PK Ripper Looptail

bikes.description: Almost new black Cannondale, has a silver bell on the left side of the handlebars, has a water bottle holder and mini tire pump on the frame, has a silver kickstand with attached by an overly long silver screw
bikes.title: Cannondale Trail 7

bikes.description: Bike went missing recently - bright neon green Cannondale trail 7, my cable lock had been snipped. It had a water bottle holder, no kickstand, and a distinctive wrapped piece of ducktape on the handlebars that i had attached my bikelight with.
bikes.title: 2018 Cannondale Trail 7

bikes.description: Specialized A1 Premium Aluminum, Trail 29er Geometry, fully butted w/ tapered headtube, forged dropouts, replaceable alloy derailleur hanger
bikes.title: 2014 Specialized Rockhopper 29

bikes.description: Black frame,  white writing and green accent stripes on the frame and seat. See pictures for full bike details
bikes.title: 2018 Kona Mahuna Trail 29er

bikes.description: brown and black specialized cross trail  hybrid mountain bike.  Mud guard on back, left side of frame has paint worn off.
bikes.title: 2009 Specialized Cross Trail

bikes.description:
Pretty much out of the box Altitude C90 model, with Shimano XT all-mountain SPD/platform pedals (M785 Trail). Pedal arms have booties at the ends to protect them from smashing the ground, Rocky-provided frame protector was never installed (instead, the bike has a long length of clear plastic adhesive on the downtube), there's a small scratch/knick on the drive side of the seat tube near the bottom bracket from when I had a spare tube zip-tied to the frame, after-market Chromag Squarewave grips. Also has a black Marsh Guard front fender with teal lettering. 
Fork	Fox 36 Float EVOL FIT4 Factory 160mm
Shock	Fox Float DPX2 Factory
Headset	FSA Orbit NO.57E
Stem	Rocky Mountain 35 CNC
Handlebar	Race Face Next R 780mm
Grips	Chromag Squarewave (black)
Brakes	Sram Guide RSC 180mm
Brake Levers	Sram Guide RSC
Shifters	Sram X01 Eagle
Front Derailleur	Rocky Mountain Spirit Guide
Rear Derailleur	Sram X01 Eagle 12 spd
Cranks & Chainrings	Sram Descendant Carbon Eagle 34T
Pedals	Shimano XT M8120 SPD pedals
Cassette	Sram XG-1295 10-50T
Chain	Sram X01 Eagle
Front Hub	Rocky Mountain Sealed Boost 15mm
Rear Hub	DT Swiss 350 Boost 148mm
Rims	27.5" Stans Flow MK3 Tubeless Ready
Tires	Maxxis Minion DHF WT Maxx Terra 3C Tubeless Ready 27.5 x 2.5/Maxxis Minion DHR II WT Maxx Terra 3C Tubeless Ready 27.5 x 2.4
Seatpost	Fox Transfer Factory 30.9mm
bikes.title: 2018 Rocky Mountain Bicycles Altitude C90

bikes.description:
Mud spots on frame, rusted around the handlebars, brakes, and pedals. 
Has a Joe's Bike Shop sticker on the lower bar of the frame directly below the seat. 
The bottle holder is broken on the left(?) side. 
Has a front light but missing the rear light. 
The bike tire treads are worn down and the front and rear tubes are different, with the rear having a longer nozzle.
Has a seat cushion, brand new derailleur with evidence of fall damage on the said side of the bike from a fall. Missing one reflector on the wheels.
bikes.title: 2009 Jamis Trail X

bikes.description:
The bike only had one brake fitted (front brake only).
The paint is very faded, especially on the left side.
The bike has no fenders fitted.  
Serial number is on the rear part of the frame.
bikes.title: 1983 Schwinn "World Tourist" step-thru frame

bikes.description: +It is an E-bike. +It has a custom lighting setup with wires running along the bottom of the frame. +The battery has a "power on" symbol on the top of it, with usb ports on the bottom and a charge port next to it, covered by a rubber flap.+It has a custom rack modification to add a bag (that I still have in my possession).+The chain has not been cleaned so it will be obviously squeaky, and the drive train needs to be fixed due to skipping and strain.+It has a larger handlebar extension.+It has a mirror on the left-side.+There is a handlebar display that shows your speed, trip length, and milage, and the last time I left it, the trip length was around 1400 miles.
bikes.title: 2016 FLX FLX Trail

bikes.description:
The handle pipe is Hussefelt brand, Truvativ. There's also a serial number underneath the pipe with the seria US PAT. 5095770.

The frame has a few stickers on it like Trail king. Atomlab on the bottom side. Other than that the frame is visibly black with some scratches on it. Bike has no gears and has only a disk break on the back wheel.
bikes.title: Atomlab low frame

bikes.description: This bike setup is the "Race XT" version of the Mach 429 Trail. Frame has been covered in many places with helicopter tape for protection - rear triangle, under downtube, front of headtube. Has SG sticker on back of seat tube and a pinhole ding on the top tube. At time of theft, bike was set up with 27.5"+ wheels instead of the 29" wheels shown in the photos.
bikes.title: 2018 Pivot Mach 429 Trail
